title: Privacy Policy
lead: Thank you for using this app. Your privacy matters, and this page explains things in a simple way. We want the app to feel safe, calm, and easy to trust.
highlight: This app does not collect, store, or share personal information.
seoDescription: Official Ei-Oh-Den privacy policy and latest topics. Find clear details about personal data collection, permissions, contact information, plus links to the novel and LINE stickers.
dashboardLead: A quick visual snapshot of the current public Ei-Oh-Den release status.

dashboardStats.label: Privacy Power
dashboardStats.note: No collection, storage, or sharing of personal data

dashboardStats.label: Store Portals
dashboardStats.note: Available on Google Play and the App Store

dashboardStats.label: Stamp Aura
dashboardStats.note: Official LINE sticker pack on sale

topicsLead: This page also collects the latest public Ei-Oh-Den related links. Alongside app download links, you can find the novel and LINE stickers here.

topics.title: Ei-Oh-Den Novel Out Now!!
topics.description: The novel edition is available on Amazon for readers who want to enjoy the story world in text form.

topics.title: Ei-Oh-Den LINE stickers are on sale
topics.description: Official stickers are available on LINE STORE so you can use the characters in everyday chats.

summaryItems: This app does not collect, store, or share personal information.
No tracking or advertising-related third-party data collection is used.
No special permissions are required for camera, microphone, location, or contacts.
This page also links to the Ei-Oh-Den novel and official LINE stickers.

faqs.question: Does Ei-Oh-Den collect personal information?
faqs.answer: No. The app does not collect personally identifiable information such as names, email addresses, phone numbers, contacts, or precise location.

faqs.question: Does the app require sensitive permissions?
faqs.answer: No. It does not require special permissions for camera, microphone, location, contacts, or similar sensitive features.

faqs.question: Does Ei-Oh-Den use analytics or advertising SDKs?
faqs.answer: Not at this time. If third-party services are added later, this page will be updated with the service names and their purposes.

faqs.question: How can I contact the developer?
faqs.answer: You can use the X account listed on this page. The page also includes direct links to the Google Play and App Store listings.

faqs.question: Is there an Ei-Oh-Den novel?
faqs.answer: Yes. This page includes a topic card linking directly to the Amazon product page for the novel.

faqs.question: Are there Ei-Oh-Den LINE stickers?
faqs.answer: Yes. This page includes a topic card linking directly to the LINE STORE sticker page.

contactNote: Questions or requests can be sent through this X profile.
duckBubble: Phew, I'm not great at this quack...

intro.title: Friendly Introduction
body: This app respects your privacy. We believe privacy information should be easy to read, so we keep this policy short and clear.
If anything changes in the future, this page will be updated so you can always check the latest version.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
body: This app does not collect personal data. It does not ask for your name, email address, phone number, contacts, precise location, or other personal information.

permissions.title: Permissions
body: This app does not require special permissions for sensitive features such as camera, microphone, location, or contacts.
If platform-level permissions are ever needed later, this policy will be updated clearly.

thirdParty.title: Third Party Services
body: This app currently does not use third party analytics, advertising, or external data collection services.
Placeholder if needed later: third party services will be listed here with a clear explanation.

contact.title: Contact
body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please feel free to contact us.
